message.content: This section can answer questions about which entities are listed under the "消除" (Elimination) category or heading. It identifies four specific titles: 漫游小镇, 食光旅行, 卡车之星, and 麦琪顿庄园. The section does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
